scripts.dev:local: concurrently -n db,server,client -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:local:db" "npm run dev:local:server" "npm run dev:local:client"
scripts.dev:local:db: set -a && . ./.env && set +a && DOCKER_CONTEXT=$DEV_DOCKER_CONTEXT docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up db
scripts.dev:local:server: set -a && . ./.env && set +a && ./docker/wait-for-db.sh && cd server && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate dev && npm run dev
scripts.dev:local:client: cd client && npx wait-on http://localhost:3000/api/health && npx vite --host
scripts.build: cd server && npm run build && cd ../client && npm run build
scripts.build:docker: set -a && . ./.env && set +a && DOCKER_CONTEXT=$DEV_DOCKER_CONTEXT docker compose build server
scripts.test: echo 'Run individual test suites: test:db, test:server, test:client, test:e2e'
